channel.title: HoldLens — What to buy (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top buy signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked on a single signed −100..+100 ConvictionScore where +100 is the strongest possible buy. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: GE BUY signal · score +41 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Chris Hohn is buying GE (GE Aerospace) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +41 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: Chris Hohn (Q8.2).

item.title: BABA BUY signal · score +39 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: David Tepper, Michael Burry are buying BABA (Alibaba) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +39 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: David Tepper (Q7.6), Michael Burry (Q4.6).

item.title: OXY BUY signal · score +33 on a −100..+100 scale
item.description: Prem Watsa, Warren Buffett, Joel Greenblatt are buying OXY (Occidental Petroleum) this quarter. Unified ConvictionScore: +33 (positive = buy, negative = sell). Quality-weighted buyer list: Prem Watsa (Q6.9), Warren Buffett (Q5.9), Joel Greenblatt (Q2.2).
